$comment: Maintainer notes — stripped from the merged settings.json by install.sh; never shipped to a user's config.
Credential-read denies and telemetry/env defaults are conventional security defaults; they were cross-referenced against trailofbits/claude-code-config.

Shell-rc Edit/Write denies block the Edit/Write TOOLS (the visible, approvable path) and stop Claude from managing your dotfiles (hand those off via `! <cmd>`). Bash-redirection writes (`echo ... >> ~/.zshrc`) are covered by command-guard.ts, which explicitly denies that vector — the two layers together close the path. Kept as a cheap defense against a persistence vector; drop them if you want Claude editing your rc files.
